title: Iterator Chain Processing
description: Implement a data processing pipeline using Rust's iterator combinators. Process a list of transactions to compute statistics using map, filter, fold, and other iterator methods.
requirements: Input: slice of Transaction structs with amount: f64, category: String, is_credit: bool
Return TransactionSummary with total_credit, total_debit, count_by_category (HashMap)
Group by category using fold or collect
Calculate sum of credits and debits separately

few_shot_examples.prompt: Use iterators to sum all even numbers in a list.
Group strings by their first character using iterators.
